name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Houston, TX: TitleMax Title Loans at 6320 Lyons Ave offers same-day title loans with quick approval.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans at 6320 Lyons Ave is a standalone title loan storefront in Houston, TX. The location serves residents seeking quick title-based financing with convenient walk-in service. Operating hours are Monday through Friday 10 AM–7 PM and Saturday 10 AM–4 PM, closed on Sundays.

This Houston location specializes in title loans and cash advances for borrowers with vehicle titles. Call 281-466-4912 to speak with loan officers at the Lyons Ave branch, request a quote, or discuss eligibility requirements for title loans in Houston.

If you're a Houston resident needing quick cash in TX, bring your government-issued ID, proof of residence, and your vehicle title. TitleMax Title Loans specializes in rapid approval and funding for title-based loans.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified applicants
Keep driving your vehicle while borrowing against its title—no vehicle surrender required
Accepts most credit types; vehicle value matters more than credit score in approval decision
Bilingual staff available at this location
Flexible Flex Line of Credit allows withdrawal all at once or incrementally up to credit limit
Extended operating hours: open weekdays until 7pm and Saturday 9am-4pm
Extremely high customer satisfaction: 5.0/5 rating across 481+ Google reviews with named staff praise
cons: No interest rates, APR, or fee information disclosed on the website—terms require in-store/phone inquiry
Title loans carry repossession risk if borrower defaults; vehicle serves as collateral
Requires clear vehicle title and valid government ID, limiting accessibility for some borrowers
Unsecured personal loan option limited to 10 specific states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Credit checks are still performed despite emphasis on credit-type flexibility; not truly 'no credit check'
best_for: Vehicle owners in Memphis area needing emergency cash within 24 hours who have clear title and steady income
Borrowers with poor or thin credit seeking collateral-based lending with vehicle access intact
Customers seeking flexible access to emergency credit lines rather than lump-sum loans
Tennessee residents exploring alternatives to payday loans or traditional personal loans
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Memphis-area vehicle owners with clear titles and stable income who need emergency cash (typically $100-$1K+) within one business day and can afford the undisclosed interest rates. The critical caveat is that title loans are collateral-based—defaulting means risking vehicle repossession—making this suitable only for borrowers confident in their repayment ability, not as a long-term or repeated credit solution.
services: Title pledges/secured title loans against vehicle equity
Flex lines of credit—secured, flexible withdrawal up to credit limit
Online loan application and management portal
Loan account management and payment services
Vehicle valuation assessment for loan qualification
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 6320 Lyons Ave, Houston, TX. Same-day title loans for quick cash.
